short_text: Jordan to Netravalkar, Bowled!! He is mighty pleased and his team-mates all rush towards him to embrace him. , fuller th
full_text: Jordan to Netravalkar, Bowled!! He is mighty pleased and his team-mates all rush towards him to embrace him. , fuller than a length, Netravalkar stays leg-side to drive, plays outside the line and gets beaten comprehensively on the inside edge. The ball crashes into the middle-stump.

short_text: Jordan to Nosthush Kenjige, Lbw!! That's plumb! 141.3kph, full, quick and on the target, a shuffling Kenjige misses the
full_text: Jordan to Nosthush Kenjige, Lbw!! That's plumb! 141.3kph, full, quick and on the target, a shuffling Kenjige misses the flick to get pinned on the front pad. He's struck low on the front leg adjacent to the sticks and ball-tracking shows it to be crashing into the middle-stump! USA had two reviews left and hence they sent it upstairs. Kenjige even had a smile on his face when he signalled T. Everyone knew that it was plumb.

short_text: Jordan to Ali Khan, Bowled!! Timber! Length ball darted in, Ali Khan stays in his crease to play across the line. A noth
full_text: Jordan to Ali Khan, Bowled!! Timber! Length ball darted in, Ali Khan stays in his crease to play across the line. A nothing shot, doesn't connect and the ball uproots the off-stump.

short_text: Jordan to Ali Khan, no run, 137.5kph, fuller than a length angled in, Ali Khan wants to hoick it across the line. Misses
full_text: Jordan to Ali Khan, no run, 137.5kph, fuller than a length angled in, Ali Khan wants to hoick it across the line. Misses, the ball beats the inside edge and eludes the off-stump by a whisker

short_text: Jordan to Corey Anderson, Caught by Harry Brook!! 137.5kph, low full toss outside off, Corey Anderson shuffles to try an
full_text: Jordan to Corey Anderson, Caught by Harry Brook!! 137.5kph, low full toss outside off, Corey Anderson shuffles to try and loft it over long-on. Doesn't get the necessary elevation and picks out the fielder in the deep. Brook barely had to move to catch this.

short_text: Sam Curran to Harmeet Singh, Caught by Jordan!! Jordan won't drop! Full toss from Sam Curran, Harmeet Singh bends his ba
full_text: Sam Curran to Harmeet Singh, Caught by Jordan!! Jordan won't drop! Full toss from Sam Curran, Harmeet Singh bends his back leg and throws his bat at it to swing it through the line. No timing behind it. Jordan moves quickly to his right, crouches low and catches it safely before tumbling. Makes a tough catch look easy.

short_text: Sam Curran to Harmeet Singh, , over long-on! 120.8kph, Harmeet Singh shuffles across, gets under this full delivery and
full_text: Sam Curran to Harmeet Singh, , over long-on! 120.8kph, Harmeet Singh shuffles across, gets under this full delivery and swings hard to thump it over wide long-on. Brook leaps to his left and sticks his left hand out, probably got fingertips on it

short_text: Sam Curran to Harmeet Singh, , no chance for Moeen on this occasion. 109.4kph, pace off, Harmeet Singh comes down the tr
full_text: Sam Curran to Harmeet Singh, , no chance for Moeen on this occasion. 109.4kph, pace off, Harmeet Singh comes down the track, moves leg-side in the process and carves it inside-out over extra cover. Good shot!

short_text: Sam Curran to Harmeet Singh, 2 runs, Harmeet Singh comes down the track to flay this full toss over the off-side. Moeen
full_text: Sam Curran to Harmeet Singh, 2 runs, Harmeet Singh comes down the track to flay this full toss over the off-side. Moeen Ali jumps at extra cover but only manages to get fingertips on it as he attempts an overhead catch

short_text: Sam Curran to Corey Anderson, 1 run, 109.4kph, back-of-the-hand slower ball, very full outside off, Anderson drills it t
full_text: Sam Curran to Corey Anderson, 1 run, 109.4kph, back-of-the-hand slower ball, very full outside off, Anderson drills it to long-off

full_text: Sam Curran to Harmeet Singh, 1 run, slower ball bouncer, Harmeet Singh pulls behind square on the on-side for a single

short_text: Jordan to Harmeet Singh, 1 run, pace off, Harmeet Singh shimmies down to heave it away, miscues to deep midwicket. Just
full_text: Jordan to Harmeet Singh, 1 run, pace off, Harmeet Singh shimmies down to heave it away, miscues to deep midwicket. Just 4 runs off the over

short_text: Jordan to Harmeet Singh, no run, 136.2kph, Harmeet Singh looks to flick from the crease but gets beaten as this length b
full_text: Jordan to Harmeet Singh, no run, 136.2kph, Harmeet Singh looks to flick from the crease but gets beaten as this length ball seams away outside off

full_text: Jordan to Harmeet Singh, no run, 136.6kph, Jordan darts a yorker outside off, Harmeet Singh shimmies down the track to force it through the off-side, doesn't connect

full_text: Jordan to Corey Anderson, 1 run, 113.5kph, off-speed short of length ball, Anderson waits and pulls. Goes to Bairstow at deep backward square leg on the bounce

full_text: Jofra Archer to Harmeet Singh, no run, Archer pulls his length back, Harmeet Singh shapes to pull but is late into his shot. Hits his thigh and goes towards backward point

short_text: Adil Rashid to Corey Anderson, no run, 81.8kph, Anderson shuffles and gets low to slogsweep ths away. The ball brushes t
full_text: Adil Rashid to Corey Anderson, no run, 81.8kph, Anderson shuffles and gets low to slogsweep ths away. The ball brushes the batter's pad outside the line of leg-stump and hits the keeper's hemlet grille before dying down on the leg-side. He didn't concede a single boundary

full_text: Adil Rashid to Corey Anderson, no run, 81.3kph, googly, spinning away outside off, Anderson gets low to slogsweep and misses as the ball spins past his outside edge

full_text: Adil Rashid to Harmeet Singh, 1 run, 87.6kph, pushed through quicker, looked like the flipper, worked through square leg by Harmeet Singh to get off the mark

full_text: Adil Rashid to Harmeet Singh, no run, flighted leggie, beats Harmeet Singh's inside edge to hit him on the front leg. Even the impact is outside leg

full_text: Adil Rashid to Corey Anderson, 1 run, 85.6kph, full on leg, flicked to deep midwicket

full_text: Adil Rashid to Corey Anderson, , leggie spinning down leg, past Anderson's flick

short_text: Livingstone to Milind Kumar, Caught by Buttler!! In the air and taken! 89.3kph, leggie on a short of length, Milind Kuma
full_text: Livingstone to Milind Kumar, Caught by Buttler!! In the air and taken! 89.3kph, leggie on a short of length, Milind Kumar rocks back to pull it away. Bounces more than he expects it to and the ball balloons up off the top-edge. Buttler calls for it, moves to his left, settles under it and pouches. USA have now lost half their side.

short_text: Livingstone to Corey Anderson, 1 run, 85.4kph, tossed up, full in length, drilled to the left of long-off and Jordan is
full_text: Livingstone to Corey Anderson, 1 run, 85.4kph, tossed up, full in length, drilled to the left of long-off and Jordan is quick to get to the ball

full_text: Livingstone to Corey Anderson, no run, premeditated reverse-sweep, the length is shortened and the ball hits him high on the bat before going to backward point on the bounce

full_text: Livingstone to Corey Anderson, 2 runs, flicked over midwicket

short_text: Livingstone to Corey Anderson, , flighted outside off, Corey Anderson brings out the reverse-sweep and hits with the spi
full_text: Livingstone to Corey Anderson, , flighted outside off, Corey Anderson brings out the reverse-sweep and hits with the spin to dispatch it over deep backward point. First six outside the powerplay!

short_text: Livingstone to Corey Anderson, no run, 95.7kph, offie outside off, pitches outside off and spins away, Corey Anderson lo
full_text: Livingstone to Corey Anderson, no run, 95.7kph, offie outside off, pitches outside off and spins away, Corey Anderson looks to sweep and misses

full_text: Jordan to Corey Anderson, 1 run, low full toss on off, Corey Anderson squeezes it to long-off for a single

full_text: Jordan to Corey Anderson, 1 run, pitched up by the bowler on off, Corey Anderson drives this along the carpet to long-on. USA's innings moving forward at a snail's pace

full_text: Jordan to Corey Anderson, no run, walks down the pitch and nudges the back of a length delivery towards the left-side of Jordan

full_text: Jordan to Corey Anderson, 2 runs, pitched up by the bowler on off, slower through air, Corey Anderson knocks it to point and sets off for a single. A needless shy at the keeper's end results in an overthrow

full_text: Jordan to Milind Kumar, 1 run, steered towards the off-side for a single by Milind Kumar

full_text: Livingstone to Corey Anderson, 2 runs, advances down the wicket to drill this to long-on but it has been stopped by the fielder near the boundary. Good effort by Curran, saves a couple of runs. Looks like Curan injured his knee slightly as it got stuck in the turf

full_text: Livingstone to Milind Kumar, 1 run, driven along the ground to long-off for a single

full_text: Adil Rashid to Milind Kumar, 1 run, slower through the air on off, Milind Kumar taps it with soft hands towards deep backward point and takes a single. Bails dislodged at the keeper's end by Buttler but Anderson was in

full_text: Adil Rashid to Nitish Kumar, Bowled!! Knocked him over! Nicely tossed up delivery by Adil Rashid, a googly that Nitish Kumar fails to read. Look to play this with lack of footwork, misses altogether and the stumps have been rattled. USA in trouble with the set batsman gone. Proving to be a drab batting performance by USA as expected.

full_text: Adil Rashid to Nitish Kumar, no run, googly around middle and leg, Nitish Kumar gets beaten due to the wrong 'un and is hit on the pads, but this was sliding down the leg-side

full_text: Adil Rashid to Aaron Jones, Bowled!! You miss, I hit. A googly on middle and leg, Aaron Jones swings and misses. The leg stump goes for a toss as Jones' rusty knock comes to an end. Never looked in his elements today.

full_text: Sam Curran to Aaron Jones, , pitched up by Sam Curran outside off, Aaron Jones opens the bat face and guides it through the gap at backward point and short third man. Nicely placed shot by the USA captain

full_text: Sam Curran to Aaron Jones, no run, directed at the stumps, Aaron Jones drives it to mid-off from within the crease

short_text: Sam Curran to Steven Taylor, Caught by Moeen Ali!! Curran strikes in his first over, removes the opener. Short and wide
full_text: Sam Curran to Steven Taylor, Caught by Moeen Ali!! Curran strikes in his first over, removes the opener. Short and wide outside off, Steven Taylor cuts it uppishly towards point and Moeen is quick to move to his left. Dives and completes a fine catch. Was the slower delivery that the left-hander failed to put away.

full_text: Sam Curran to Steven Taylor, , Full and wide outside off, Steven Taylor throws his hands at it and the outside edge beats the fielder at short third man

full_text: Sam Curran to Steven Taylor, no run, full and wide outside off, Steven Taylor drives it to cover with a forward lunge

full_text: Topley to Nitish Kumar, , USA off to a positive start. On a length around middle and leg, Nitish Kumar flicks it over wide mid-on and adds more to the tally. Nitish Kumar looking good

full_text: Topley to Nitish Kumar, no run, short of a length around off, Nitish Kumar rides the bounce and taps it towards point

short_text: Topley to Nitish Kumar, 2 runs, touch fuller on off, Nitish Kumar drives it through cover for a couple of runs, neat tim
full_text: Topley to Nitish Kumar, 2 runs, touch fuller on off, Nitish Kumar drives it through cover for a couple of runs, neat timing

short_text: Jofra Archer to Steven Taylor, 2 runs, pitched up by the bowler on off, Steven Taylor drives it through cover for a coup
full_text: Jofra Archer to Steven Taylor, 2 runs, pitched up by the bowler on off, Steven Taylor drives it through cover for a couple of runs to end the over. That was a good over by Jofra Archer

short_text: Jofra Archer to Steven Taylor, no run, on a length outside off, shaping away from the batter, Steven Taylor goes for a d
full_text: Jofra Archer to Steven Taylor, no run, on a length outside off, shaping away from the batter, Steven Taylor goes for a drive, gets beaten

short_text: Jofra Archer to Steven Taylor, no run, Steven Taylor taps it in front of backward point and sets off for a single. Livin
full_text: Jofra Archer to Steven Taylor, no run, Steven Taylor taps it in front of backward point and sets off for a single. Livingstone had all three stumps to aim at but he misses. Taylor had given up as he had no chance to get back in, but he lives to fight

short_text: Jofra Archer to Steven Taylor, no run, on a length around off, keeps straight as Steven Taylor plays inside the line, le
full_text: Jofra Archer to Steven Taylor, no run, on a length around off, keeps straight as Steven Taylor plays inside the line, lets it through to the keeper

short_text: Jofra Archer to Steven Taylor, no run, yorker length delivery on off, Steven Taylor digs it back to Jofra Archer who sti
full_text: Jofra Archer to Steven Taylor, no run, yorker length delivery on off, Steven Taylor digs it back to Jofra Archer who sticks out his right hand to stop it

short_text: Jofra Archer to Steven Taylor, no run, full and quick on middle and leg, Steven Taylor looks to flick it away, gets hit
full_text: Jofra Archer to Steven Taylor, no run, full and quick on middle and leg, Steven Taylor looks to flick it away, gets hit on the pads though. Archer appeals for an lbw, but the umpire wasn't interested

short_text: Topley to Gous, Caught by Philip Salt!! Topley strikes in the first over of the match. Drifting on the pads, Gous looks
full_text: Topley to Gous, Caught by Philip Salt!! Topley strikes in the first over of the match. Drifting on the pads, Gous looks to go big, flicks it towards deep square leg but doesn't get the timing right. Easy catch for Salt in the deep and Gous walks back after a promising start. Topley after conceding a six, has the last laugh.

short_text: Topley to Gous, no run, on a length around leg, this ball shapes back in to hit him on the pads. Gous was looking to nud
full_text: Topley to Gous, no run, on a length around leg, this ball shapes back in to hit him on the pads. Gous was looking to nudge it away, but couldn't make contact

short_text: Topley to Gous, , has that gone the distance? Drifting on the pads, hint of swing and Gous has flicked it away towards f
full_text: Topley to Gous, , has that gone the distance? Drifting on the pads, hint of swing and Gous has flicked it away towards fine leg. Hits the cushions on the full and that's the first maximum of the match

short_text: Topley to Gous, no run, lovely delivery. On a length around off, holds its line, Gous goes for a straight drive, gets be
full_text: Topley to Gous, no run, lovely delivery. On a length around off, holds its line, Gous goes for a straight drive, gets beaten on the outside edge

short_text: Topley to Gous, 2 runs, leading edge but safe. On a length around middle and off, Gous looks to work across the line, ge
full_text: Topley to Gous, 2 runs, leading edge but safe. On a length around middle and off, Gous looks to work across the line, gets a leading edge that clears cover and the batter is off the mark with a couple of runs

short_text: Topley to Steven Taylor, 1 run, pitched up by the bowler outside off, shaping away from the batter, Taylor drives it upp
full_text: Topley to Steven Taylor, 1 run, pitched up by the bowler outside off, shaping away from the batter, Taylor drives it uppishly through backward point and opens his account

short_text: van Schalkwyk to Buttler, , Buttler finishes it off in emphatic fashion. A slower ball on a length outside off, Buttler
full_text: van Schalkwyk to Buttler, , Buttler finishes it off in emphatic fashion. A slower ball on a length outside off, Buttler reaches for it and cuts in the air wide of both backward point and short third man

short_text: van Schalkwyk to Philip Salt, 1 run, full outside off, Philip Salt gets forward to drive to long-on
full_text: van Schalkwyk to Philip Salt, 1 run, full outside off, Philip Salt gets forward to drive to long-on

short_text: van Schalkwyk to Buttler, 1 run, full outside off, Buttler gets forward to drive to sweeper cover
full_text: van Schalkwyk to Buttler, 1 run, full outside off, Buttler gets forward to drive to sweeper cover

short_text: van Schalkwyk to Philip Salt, 1 run, good length on middle, Philip Salt pulls on the bounce to deep mid-wicket
full_text: van Schalkwyk to Philip Salt, 1 run, good length on middle, Philip Salt pulls on the bounce to deep mid-wicket

short_text: Harmeet Singh to Buttler, , what batting! Buttler has single-handedly taken down Harmeet Singh and has put his side on t
full_text: Harmeet Singh to Buttler, , what batting! Buttler has single-handedly taken down Harmeet Singh and has put his side on the cusp of a fantastic win. On a length and drifting in, Buttler just stands and belts that into the solar panels at long-on. The on-air comms say those panels are costly and this is the second time in the match that Buttler has destroyed them. England just a hit away now.

short_text: Harmeet Singh to Buttler, , fired well outside off, the pressure telling on Harmeet Singh and it's a wide
full_text: Harmeet Singh to Buttler, , fired well outside off, the pressure telling on Harmeet Singh and it's a wide

short_text: Harmeet Singh to Buttler, , Again drifting outside the leg-stump, almost a free-hit for Buttler who heaves this over dee
full_text: Harmeet Singh to Buttler, , Again drifting outside the leg-stump, almost a free-hit for Buttler who heaves this over deep square leg, again flies away

short_text: Harmeet Singh to Buttler, , Full and in the slot on the stumps, Buttler makes room and golf-swings straight down the gro
full_text: Harmeet Singh to Buttler, , Full and in the slot on the stumps, Buttler makes room and golf-swings straight down the ground. This is clean striking

short_text: Harmeet Singh to Buttler, , now on the leg-side. A slower delivery drifting outside the leg-stump, Buttler swings it pow
full_text: Harmeet Singh to Buttler, , now on the leg-side. A slower delivery drifting outside the leg-stump, Buttler swings it powerfully over deep mid-wicket, into the crowd

short_text: Harmeet Singh to Buttler, , He comes down the track and takes it on a length, lofts flat and over long-off, so easily do
full_text: Harmeet Singh to Buttler, , He comes down the track and takes it on a length, lofts flat and over long-off, so easily done

short_text: Harmeet Singh to Philip Salt, 1 run, flat good length on middle, bunted to long-on
full_text: Harmeet Singh to Philip Salt, 1 run, flat good length on middle, bunted to long-on

short_text: van Schalkwyk to Philip Salt, 1 run, short of length on middle and leg, Philip Salt mistimes the pull wide of short fine
full_text: van Schalkwyk to Philip Salt, 1 run, short of length on middle and leg, Philip Salt mistimes the pull wide of short fine-leg for one

short_text: van Schalkwyk to Buttler, 1 run, full outside off, Buttler gets forward to drive to sweeper cover
full_text: van Schalkwyk to Buttler, 1 run, full outside off, Buttler gets forward to drive to sweeper cover

short_text: van Schalkwyk to Buttler, no run, a wide yorker length delivery outside off, Buttler makes room outside the leg-stump an
full_text: van Schalkwyk to Buttler, no run, a wide yorker length delivery outside off, Buttler makes room outside the leg-stump and can't reach it in the end

short_text: van Schalkwyk to Buttler, , the back of the hand slower ball goes horribly wrong, well down leg and does not land on the
full_text: van Schalkwyk to Buttler, , the back of the hand slower ball goes horribly wrong, well down leg and does not land on the cutstrip, initially umpire Joel Wilson signals a wide and then changes his decision

short_text: van Schalkwyk to Philip Salt, 1 run, wide of the crease and back of a length just outside off, pulled to deep square leg
full_text: van Schalkwyk to Philip Salt, 1 run, wide of the crease and back of a length just outside off, pulled to deep square leg

short_text: van Schalkwyk to Philip Salt, , such power from Philip Salt. Full on off, he drives hard and long-off tries his best as
full_text: van Schalkwyk to Philip Salt, , such power from Philip Salt. Full on off, he drives hard and long-off tries his best as he runs and dives to his left but the ball wins

short_text: van Schalkwyk to Philip Salt, no run, van Schalkwyk starts with a yorker length delivery on the stumps, dug out
full_text: van Schalkwyk to Philip Salt, no run, van Schalkwyk starts with a yorker length delivery on the stumps, dug out

short_text: Ali Khan to Philip Salt, 1 run, short of length around off, Philip Salt punches firmly off the back foot to sweeper cove
full_text: Ali Khan to Philip Salt, 1 run, short of length around off, Philip Salt punches firmly off the back foot to sweeper cover

short_text: Ali Khan to Philip Salt, 2 runs, full and shaping back into the pads, Philip Salt gets a thin inside-edge on the flick o
full_text: Ali Khan to Philip Salt, 2 runs, full and shaping back into the pads, Philip Salt gets a thin inside-edge on the flick on to pad, no mid-wicket and easy two

short_text: Ali Khan to Philip Salt, , full and slingy but down leg, Philip Salt swings and misses
full_text: Ali Khan to Philip Salt, , full and slingy but down leg, Philip Salt swings and misses

short_text: Ali Khan to Buttler, 1 run, full and right up there on off, Buttler drills it hard and straight to long-off
full_text: Ali Khan to Buttler, 1 run, full and right up there on off, Buttler drills it hard and straight to long-off

short_text: Ali Khan to Buttler, 2 runs, the attempted yorker is a low full-toss on the stumps, Buttler heaves wide of deep backward
full_text: Ali Khan to Buttler, 2 runs, the attempted yorker is a low full-toss on the stumps, Buttler heaves wide of deep backward square leg for a couple

short_text: Ali Khan to Philip Salt, 1 run, short of length and angling into leg-stump, nudged towards mid-on for one
full_text: Ali Khan to Philip Salt, 1 run, short of length and angling into leg-stump, nudged towards mid-on for one

short_text: Ali Khan to Philip Salt, 2 runs, what was Gous thinking there? Nearly gives away four more with a wild throw when Buttle
full_text: Ali Khan to Philip Salt, 2 runs, what was Gous thinking there? Nearly gives away four more with a wild throw when Buttler was in, thankfully for USA, long-off was in place and he fields. Was a short of length delivery just outside off, cut to Anderson at backward point who fumbles and gives away two, sloppy

short_text: Nosthush Kenjige to Buttler, 2 runs, 83.5kph, swept to deep square leg. England have raced away to 60/0 in the powerplay
full_text: Nosthush Kenjige to Buttler, 2 runs, 83.5kph, swept to deep square leg. England have raced away to 60/0 in the powerplay

short_text: Nosthush Kenjige to Buttler, no run, 90.7kph, nudges this length ball on middle and leg to midwicket
full_text: Nosthush Kenjige to Buttler, no run, 90.7kph, nudges this length ball on middle and leg to midwicket

short_text: Nosthush Kenjige to Buttler, , 88.4kph, fullish on the stumps and Buttler reverses his stance to broom it fiercely wide
full_text: Nosthush Kenjige to Buttler, , 88.4kph, fullish on the stumps and Buttler reverses his stance to broom it fiercely wide of backward point

short_text: Nosthush Kenjige to Buttler, , in the air, doesn't carry and four. Buttler comes down the track, decides to loft it down
full_text: Nosthush Kenjige to Buttler, , in the air, doesn't carry and four. Buttler comes down the track, decides to loft it downtown. Not quite off the middle of the bat. Long-off runs across to his right and dives. The ball falls short of him and eventually eludes him to hit the ropes

short_text: Nosthush Kenjige to Philip Salt, 1 run, 87.5kph, Philip Salt miscues the heave and the ball falls between deep midwicket
full_text: Nosthush Kenjige to Philip Salt, 1 run, 87.5kph, Philip Salt miscues the heave and the ball falls between deep midwicket and long-on

short_text: Nosthush Kenjige to Buttler, 1 run, 89.8kph, Buttler comes down the track and turns this length ball through wide mid-on
full_text: Nosthush Kenjige to Buttler, 1 run, 89.8kph, Buttler comes down the track and turns this length ball through wide mid-on

short_text: Ali Khan to Philip Salt, , top shot! 132.6kph, very full on off, Philip Salt crouches a bit and crunches the drive throu
full_text: Ali Khan to Philip Salt, , top shot! 132.6kph, very full on off, Philip Salt crouches a bit and crunches the drive through the covers. The ball reaches the fence in a jiffy. 16 runs off the over!

short_text: Ali Khan to Philip Salt, 2 runs, 135.4kph, leg-lined and that's been tucked away to deep square leg's right for a couple
full_text: Ali Khan to Philip Salt, 2 runs, 135.4kph, leg-lined and that's been tucked away to deep square leg's right for a couple of runs

short_text: Ali Khan to Philip Salt, no run, 133.4kph, short of length, punched to extra cover
full_text: Ali Khan to Philip Salt, no run, 133.4kph, short of length, punched to extra cover

short_text: Ali Khan to Buttler, 1 run, fuller in length and Buttler drills it to long-on. There's protection in the deep now
full_text: Ali Khan to Buttler, 1 run, fuller in length and Buttler drills it to long-on. There's protection in the deep now

short_text: Ali Khan to Buttler, , Buttler is in a punishing mood today. Waltzes down the track and hammers this length ball over mi
full_text: Ali Khan to Buttler, , Buttler is in a punishing mood today. Waltzes down the track and hammers this length ball over mid-on

short_text: Ali Khan to Buttler, no run, 133.7kph, in-slanting length ball, Buttler defends from the crease
full_text: Ali Khan to Buttler, no run, 133.7kph, in-slanting length ball, Buttler defends from the crease

short_text: Ali Khan to Buttler, , 134.7kph, horror start from Ali Khan! Sprays a full delivery miles down the leg-side. Would have
full_text: Ali Khan to Buttler, , 134.7kph, horror start from Ali Khan! Sprays a full delivery miles down the leg-side. Would have been five wides even against a left-handed batter

short_text: Nosthush Kenjige to Philip Salt, no run, in-dart, Philip Salt stays leg-side to pull it away and misses to get hit on th
full_text: Nosthush Kenjige to Philip Salt, no run, in-dart, Philip Salt stays leg-side to pull it away and misses to get hit on the pads

short_text: Nosthush Kenjige to Buttler, 1 run, Buttler backs away and Kenjige follows him, punched to long-off
full_text: Nosthush Kenjige to Buttler, 1 run, Buttler backs away and Kenjige follows him, punched to long-off

short_text: Nosthush Kenjige to Buttler, no run, Buttler tries to reverse-sweep, Kenjige bowls a fullish ball spinning away a bit. N
full_text: Nosthush Kenjige to Buttler, no run, Buttler tries to reverse-sweep, Kenjige bowls a fullish ball spinning away a bit. No contact made

short_text: Nosthush Kenjige to Buttler, , 88.1kph, good use of the feet! Buttler dances down the track, gets close to the pitch of
full_text: Nosthush Kenjige to Buttler, , 88.1kph, good use of the feet! Buttler dances down the track, gets close to the pitch of the ball and thumps it over mid-on for a one-bounce four

short_text: Nosthush Kenjige to Philip Salt, 1 run, 88.9kph, fullish ball on off, driven along the ground to long-off
full_text: Nosthush Kenjige to Philip Salt, 1 run, 88.9kph, fullish ball on off, driven along the ground to long-off

short_text: Nosthush Kenjige to Buttler, 1 run, 89.7kph, flat ball on middle, flicked to deep midwicket
full_text: Nosthush Kenjige to Buttler, 1 run, 89.7kph, flat ball on middle, flicked to deep midwicket

short_text: Netravalkar to Buttler, 1 run, round the wicket, walks forward and across, taps this short of length ball towards point
full_text: Netravalkar to Buttler, 1 run, round the wicket, walks forward and across, taps this short of length ball towards point and keeps the strike

short_text: Netravalkar to Buttler, , one-handed six! Slower ball, full and in the slot marginally outside off, Buttler's bottom han
full_text: Netravalkar to Buttler, , one-handed six! Slower ball, full and in the slot marginally outside off, Buttler's bottom hand comes off the bat handle as he swings through the line. But the ball has the wings to go all the way

short_text: Netravalkar to Buttler, , Buttler skips down the track, slightly moves leg-side in the process, gets under this full bal
full_text: Netravalkar to Buttler, , Buttler skips down the track, slightly moves leg-side in the process, gets under this full ball bowled from over the wicket and smokes it downtown for a That's damaged one of the solar panels on the roof

short_text: Netravalkar to Buttler, , superb timing! 125.3kph, length ball, Buttler walks forward and across, leans across and drive
full_text: Netravalkar to Buttler, , superb timing! 125.3kph, length ball, Buttler walks forward and across, leans across and drives sweetly through extra cover

short_text: Netravalkar to Buttler, no run, 126.6kph, short of length ball, tapped to backward point
full_text: Netravalkar to Buttler, no run, 126.6kph, short of length ball, tapped to backward point

short_text: Netravalkar to Buttler, 2 runs, 124kph, round the wicket, Buttler advances down the track and chip-drives this short of
full_text: Netravalkar to Buttler, 2 runs, 124kph, round the wicket, Buttler advances down the track and chip-drives this short of a good length ball over mid-off. The bat turned at the point of impact

full_text: Harmeet Singh to Buttler, 1 run, 94.6kph, fullish ball from wide of the crease, Buttler drives it to long-off

full_text: Harmeet Singh to Philip Salt, 1 run, driven to long-off

full_text: Harmeet Singh to Philip Salt, no run, stump-to-stump line, Salt defends back to Harmeet Singh

full_text: Harmeet Singh to Buttler, 1 run, 90.9kph, angled in and Buttler works it through midwicket

full_text: Harmeet Singh to Buttler, no run, 86.7kph, cut straight to point

full_text: Netravalkar to Philip Salt, no run, 127.2kph, pitched up, Philip Salt drives with minimum feet movement and finds cover

full_text: Netravalkar to Buttler, 1 run, 125.5kph, Buttler shuffles across to work this length ball into the leg-side, gets a faint inside edge onto his pad

short_text: Netravalkar to Buttler, no run, walks forward and across, leans and drives but straight to cover
full_text: Netravalkar to Buttler, no run, walks forward and across, leans and drives but straight to cover

full_text: Netravalkar to Buttler, no run, 124.9kph, Buttler tentatively pokes with an opened bat-face against this away-angler. Misses the outside edge by a whisker

full_text: Netravalkar to Buttler, no run, inswinger, length ball on middle, pushed back to the bowler

full_text: Netravalkar to Philip Salt, 1 run, 126.7kph, back of a length, hint of shape into the right-hander, nudged to midwicket and a misfield allows Salt to get off the mark
